projectFeedFishSummaryReport.description: Shows cage, warehouse, total fish and total feed quantities by project in a single report.
projectFeedFishSummaryReport.loading: Loading project feed and fish summary...
projectFeedFishSummaryReport.loadFailed: Project feed and fish summary could not be loaded.
projectFeedFishSummaryReport.tableDescription: Totals are calculated from cage and warehouse balances plus posted feeding records.

cards.totalFishDescription: Total live fish count in cage and warehouse balances.
cards.totalFeedDescription: Total feed quantity calculated from posted feeding records.
cards.warehouseFishDescription: Live fish count shown in project warehouses.
cards.activeCageDescription: Number of cages currently active in projects.
